RADIO-START-Lord-Seek and Destroy: KILL EVERY LAST ONE OF THEM!
RADIO-START-Emperor-Eliminate Commander: We need to take out the commander.
RADIO-START-Mark-Eliminate Commander: We just need to take out the target.
RADIO-START-Wizard-Escort: Keep it safe! It's a pain to repair...
RADIO-START-Sovereign-Defense: I don't wanna lose the APC...
Shop-Lord-Bought-2: I'd be very happy to take that off your hands!
Shop-Emperor-Bought-1-Shopkeeper: Well it just so happens that we're selling it!
Shop-Emperor-Bought-2: Could you tell me anything about this one?
Shop-Emperor-Bought-2-Shopkeeper: Ehehehe...I know nothing about this thing...
Shop-Wizard-Bought-2: This better arrive in one piece.
Shop-Wizard-Bought-3: Oh that'd be nice to have.
Shop-Wizard-Bought-4: D'you also sell booze? Cause you should.
Shop-Sovereign-Bought-1: I'd like to get this please!
Shop-Sovereign-Bought-1-Shopkeeper: Of course! You, did pay for it?
Shop-Duke-Bought-2: You ever use any of this stuff?
Shop-Duke-Bought-2-Shopkeeper: No no no, I don't even know how it works.
Shop-Duke-Bought-3-Shopkeeper: Sure! Let just figure out how the register works...
Shop-Jester-Bought-1: I expect GREAT quality from this...
Shop-Jester-Bought-2: Oh NO, it's sill ''you'' working the shop...
Shop-Jester-Bought-2-Shopkeeper: I am sorry, I am the only one here!
Shop-Jester-Bought-3: So... how much for that, Maurice?
Shop-Jester-Bought-3-Shopkeeper: YOU KNOW THAT'S NOT MY NAME!!!
Shop-Condor-Bought-2: I could make good use of this, I'll take it.
Shop-Condor-Bought-4-Shopkeeper: I am so glad you're not robbing me.
Shop-Emperor-Party-Bought-1: Heh. this should get some nice reactions.
Shop-Emperor-Party-Bought-2: We'll make the most of this.
Shop-Sovereign-Party-Bought-1: I'd like to have that please, all of us could use it!
Shop-Sovereign-Party-Bought-1-Shopkeeper: Sure, I am sending it your way now.
Shop-Sovereign-Party-Bought-2: I am getting this for all of us.
Shop-Duke-Party-Bought-1: Hope Corrine can use this well...
Shop-Duke-Party-Bought-2: Seven Birds with one stone... does that make sense?
Shop-Duke-Party-Bought-3: Didn't expect something like this here
Shop-Jester-Party-Bought-1: You really gotta send that in one piece. Or Jeanne is gonna tear me appart!
Shop-Jester-Party-Bought-2: Some items are underpriced. I am not telling you which...
Shop-Jester-Party-Bought-2-Shopkeeper: Euh, I thought I did a good job...
Shop-Condor-Party-Bought-3-Shopkeeper: Yes yes it for sale! Take it!
Upgrade-Desc-Awareness: Increase everybody's Stealth Counter Modifier (Make it easier to spot enemies in stealth)
Upgrade-Desc-Lucky Shot: Unlocks critical shots. Different rates based on weapon.
Upgrade-Desc-Safe Bet: Increases chance to have critical shots. Cannot be used with All in.
Upgrade-Desc-All in: Increases damage of critical shots. Cannot be used with Safe Bet.
Upgrade-Desc-Risk Management: Further increases chance to have critical shots.
Upgrade-Desc-Double Down: Further increases damage of critical shots.
Upgrade-Desc-Additional Body Armour: Increase the amount of armour each character starts with.
Upgrade-Desc-Reinforced Plates: Increase physical damage resistance for every character.
Upgrade-Desc-Fire Retardant Armour: Increase fire damage resistance for every character.
Upgrade-Desc-Anti Boom Boom Armour: Increase explosion damage resistance for every character.
Upgrade-Desc-Anti Laser Coating: Increase energy damage resistance for every character.
Upgrade-Desc-Skill Issue: Skill recharge slower. Buff to speed and FOV
Upgrade-Desc-Skill Solution: Skills recharge faster. Minor debuff to speed and FOV
Upgrade-Desc-Seeking Blue Balls: Blue Balls take a few seconds before starting to move, then move toward the closest enemy
Upgrade-Desc-Bouncing Blue Balls: Blue balls will now bounce when hitting walls. Cannot be used with Seeking Blue Balls
Upgrade-Desc-Homing Blue Balls: Blue balls home toward the closest enemy
Upgrade-Desc-Bouncy Blue Balls: Blue balls gain speed each time they hit a wall.
Upgrade-Desc-3rd Degree Burn: Explosions caused by Lord causes the burning status effect.
Upgrade-Desc-Shrapnel: Explosions caused by Lord shoots shrapnel in random directions.
Upgrade-Desc-Giga ton Punch: Everybody is affected by the knockback of Gauntlet Punch. Speeds up the punch. Not by much
Upgrade-Desc-Taunt: Gauntlet Punch mutilplies Lord's current agro by 1.5
Upgrade-Desc-Rubber grenades: Projectiles shot by Lord bounce on walls
Upgrade-Desc-Can't touch me: Lord can dash more often when agro is maxed.
Upgrade-Desc-Remote Detonation: Presssing the interact key (E By default) let's you detonate your projectiles early, they get a damage boost when doing so
Upgrade-Desc-Super Duper Ultimate Death: Upgrades Beast Mode. Doubles duration. Lord gets max agro. Lord cannot die during the duration, still takes damage but doesn't go under 1. Can't use weapons for 5 sec after the effect ends
Upgrade-Desc-Dashing Blue Balls: When Lord dashes, summons 3 blue balls in the same direction as the dash
Upgrade-Desc-Kick and Run: Emperor gains a temporary speed boost after kicking someone.
Upgrade-Desc-Seduced Shopkeeper: Emperor doesn't have to pay when switching weapons from the shop.
Upgrade-Desc-Overly Prepared: Emperor grants bonuses to all deployed teammates at the start of the mission. Bonuses change based on mission type and faction.
Upgrade-Desc-Kick to the Balls: Enemies kicked by Emperor receives more damange while stunned.
Upgrade-Desc-Skilled: Give extra effects to Emperor's Mega Buff based on deployed teammates
Upgrade-Desc-Bad Luck?: When Emperor is deployed, Some enemies' weapons have a chance to jam.
Upgrade-Desc-Mastermind: Each time an ally activates their second skill. Emperor's Mega Buff get recharged.
Upgrade-Desc-Alpha Buff: When Emperor uses Mega Buff. Sets his max health to 1 for the mission and gain massives stat buffs.
Upgrade-Desc-Omega Buff: Double's the duration of Emperor's Mega Buff.
Upgrade-Desc-Kicking Blue Balls: Emperor summons blue balls after kciking 10 enemies.
Upgrade-Desc-Overclocked: Wizard's turrets fire faster. Ammo capacity is not changed.
Upgrade-Desc-Self Destruct: Wizard's buildings explode when destroyed. This does deal damage to enemies.
Upgrade-Desc-Field Repair: Wizard's Building skill can give armour points to M3-D1C.
Upgrade-Desc-Special Coating: Wizard's buildings no loner take damage from fire and energy.
Upgrade-Desc-Resupply: Extra ammo gained from Guns Blazing goes into the ammo pool. Wizard's turrets regain all their ammo.
Upgrade-Desc-Short Temper: Wizard gets a speed boost and gains time 1.5 resistance for 5 sec after getting hit.
Upgrade-Desc-Wrench Wench: Wizard receives half her clip size back whenever a building is destroyed.
Upgrade-Desc-Busting Blue Balls: Wizard summons Blue Balls when a building is destroyed.
Upgrade-Desc-Scavenge: Sovreign get back 1 bullet when defeating an enemy.
Upgrade-Desc-Duck and Cover: Sovreign's agro is lowered when dashing
Upgrade-Desc-I See You!: Sovreign deals extra damage to enemies with the visible status effect.
Upgrade-Desc-Nothing to see!: Sovreign's agro starts to decreases faster.
Upgrade-Desc-Safety Corner: Sovreign doesn't take damage while in the cardboard box
Upgrade-Desc-Mini Rambo: Sovreign's reload times are heavily shorten
Upgrade-Desc-Eagle Eye: Increases Sovreign's vision range, ability to counter stealth and increases the effect duration of Detect Targets
Upgrade-Desc-Exposed Blue Balls: Sovreign summons blue balls when she's detected.
Upgrade-Desc-Stun Strike: Duke's melee attacks can stun enemies.
Upgrade-Desc-Poison Strike: Duke's melee attacks can inflict a damage over time effect and reduce damage resistances.
Upgrade-Desc-Shadow Walk: Duke doesn't make noise when walking.
Upgrade-Desc-Discombobulate: Increase stun time and give knockback on Duke's melee attacks.
Upgrade-Desc-Concussion: Decreses Duke's agro on stun strikes hits.
Upgrade-Desc-Infection: Also apply slowness to poisened enemies.
Upgrade-Desc-Neurotoxin: Poison raises agro on affected enemies.
Upgrade-Desc-Piercing Strike: Duke's melee attacks ignore enemy armour.
Upgrade-Desc-Out of Sight Out of Mind: Duke doesn't take damage if he's not being targeted.
Upgrade-Desc-Tail & Blue Balls: Projectiles parried with Tail Swipe become Blue Balls
Upgrade-Desc-Surge Protection: Jester no longer stuns himself while using Discharge.
Upgrade-Desc-Profanity Update: Jester's Robot Fuck Off deals more damage and destroys enemy bullets.
Upgrade-Desc-Super Kidnapping: Jester can use the Nihilist Stretcher on bosses. Move speed of Jester is halved and the boss can still act.
Upgrade-Desc-Power Boost: Allies near Jester get their skills recharged when he uses Discharge.
Upgrade-Desc-OUT OF MY WAY!: Jester damages and stuns enemies when dashing into them.
Upgrade-Desc-S41-Lor Firmware: Increased range of Jester's Robot Fuck Off
Upgrade-Desc-Electronic Swearfare: Discharge makes enemy missiles target enemies
Upgrade-Desc-Improved Hardware: Major Stat increase to Jester's; Spd, VisRg, SltMod, DshSpd, DshReco
Upgrade-Desc-Improved Software: Major Stat increase to Jester's; VisRg, SltCntr, Driving, Skill recharge rate
Upgrade-Desc-Brittle Blue Balls: When Jester receives damage, summon blue balls in a circle.
Upgrade-Desc-Ricochet: Bullets splits in 2 and bounces when hitting walls. Split and bounce only happens once. Flechettes bounces 3 times and do not split.
Upgrade-Desc-Spread: When Vincent defeats an enemy, any remaing debuffs get's tranfered to enemies close by
Upgrade-Desc-Guardian: While Vincent is standing still and not attacking, double resistances and increased agro gain.
Upgrade-Desc-Pierce: Condor's bullets have a piercing effect
Upgrade-Desc-Intimidation: Condor has a 25% chance to give enemies an inacuracy debuff for 10 sec on hit.
Upgrade-Desc-Fear: Condor has a 25% chance to give enemies an fire rate debuff for 10 sec on hit.
Upgrade-Desc-Menace: Enemies near Condor do not attack.
Upgrade-Desc-Bullying: Condor ignore resistances of enemies without armour
Upgrade-Desc-Terror: Enemies targeting Condor get a speed penalty
Upgrade-Desc-Unbreaking Blue Balls: When Last Stand's effect is used, summon a circle of blue balls around Condor.
Upgrade-Desc-III, L'Impératrice: Curtis now has knockback on his kick.
Upgrade-Desc-X, La Roue de Fortune: Curtis recieves a small random buff each time he kicks a bullet.
Upgrade-Desc-VII, Le Chariot: Curtis summons a homing sword when dashing. The swords targets a nearby enemy and does small damage.
Upgrade-Desc-VI, L'Amoureux: A Doppelgänger will be spawned when Curtis is deployed alone.
Upgrade-Desc-XI, La Force: Curtis damages enemies when dashing through them.
Upgrade-Desc-XIV, Tempérance: Curtis gains armour back when breaking the armour of an enemy.
Upgrade-Desc-XIII, La Mort: Curtis gains health back when defeating an enemy.
Upgrade-Desc-XII, Le Pendu: Curtis' damage gets doubled after lossing 66% of his health.
Upgrade-Desc-XX, Le Jugement: Blue balls generated by Curtis now explode.
Upgrade-Desc-Cremation: Lawrence's fire projectiles give the visible status on hit
Upgrade-Desc-Salamander: Lawrence is now immune to fire damage.
Upgrade-Desc-Slow Burn: Increases on long enemies set on fire by Lawrence burn.
Upgrade-Desc-Spontaneous Combustion: Increases burn damage but decreases on long enemies set on fire by Lawrence burn.
Upgrade-Desc-Dragon's Breath: Lawrence deals more damage when he's burning. Burn duration is double when hit without a burn.
Upgrade-Desc-Inferno: Every 2 seconds, Lawrence spawns a circle of fire and sets himself on fire.
Upgrade-Desc-Burning Blue Balls: Lawrence summons blue balls when hitting a burning enemy.
Upgrade-Desc-Low Pressure Reloader: Mark reloads are faster if whe he isn't targeted
Upgrade-Desc-Slow mark: When Mark reloads, a mark which slow down an enemy on a hit is placed.
Upgrade-Desc-Burning mark: When Mark hits an enemy, there's a 25% chance to place mark on that enemy which cause burning on the enemy on a hit
Upgrade-Desc-Like a Shadow: Mark's weapons are quieter and makes no noise while walking.
Upgrade-Desc-Get Out: Mark pushes away enemies close to him whenever he fires his weapon.
Upgrade-Desc-Disable weapon mark: When Mark uses his smoke grenade, a mark which temporarly disables an enemy's weapon on a hit is placed.
Upgrade-Desc-Helping mark: When Mark uses target locator, a mark which increase the hit box of an enemy on a hit is placed.
Upgrade-Desc-Stun mark: When Mark hits an enemy whit his charger empty, a mark which stuns an enemy on a hit is placed.
Upgrade-Desc-And Stay Back: Enemies hit by Mark get knocked back.
Upgrade-Desc-Marked Blue Balls: When a mark is triggered, summons blue balls on the marked enemy.
Upgrade-Desc-Speed Dial: The cooldown between Vivianne spawning summons is reduced.
Upgrade-Desc-Conference Call: Vivianne no longer has a limit on summons. Only 1 instance of a summon is allowed.
Annals-2100-Solar War | January - April: On the 2nd of January 2100, contact with mining colonies was suddenly lost. Shortly after, multiple unkown space ships were detected entering the Solar System. 500 ships were esstimated to have entered.|| ||The enemy quickly mobilized to attack Earth and prevent travel between planets. Military units on anti space piracy operation were the first to make contact with the aliens, while governments were in disarray.|| ||After a series of orbital bombardement, allien land forces were first deployed in Western Africa.|| ||By early February, most countries had basic plans to defend themselves agaisnt the invasion. The UK, Taiwan and Japan made extensive use of AA systems to limit damage from the bombardment and prevent land invasions.|| ||In March more land invasions were started and a few countries fell to them. Colonies started to struggle to feed themselves.|| ||April was marked by failed attemps to take back control of Earth's orbit.
Annals-2100-Solar War | May - August: Through April and May, more and more civil space ships were militarized to
Annals-2105-Pirate attack on Zoar: In March of 2105, the gang of space pirate let by Morgan Reed attacked various installations of the Zoar colony.|| ||Bounties for key figures of the gang were quickly issued. Curtis Miller, a mercenary was able to capture all the targets within a week.|| ||The following trial ended up revraling that Morgan Reed was convinced by an unknown group to cause mayhem as cover for an clandestine operation.Presence this group was proven by an attack on the gun shop of Curtis' sister, Vivianne Miller.|| ||A few hideouts of the group were found thanks to Lawrence Reed but only corpses were found.|| ||Most members of the gang were released due to the lack of prison capacity. The only ones to walk away as innocent were Mary Reed due to her status as a minor, Lawrence Reed and portion of the gang under his control due to them aiding the capture of Morgan Reed and the following investigation.
Organizations-Mercenary Teams-Zoar Colon: As the name might suggest, this organization primarly acts as a gun store located in Zoar. The store is opporated by Vivianne Miller who manages the store and acts as a handler for Curtis Miller. ||||Curtis is the only mercenary soley working with the store but makes frequent partnerships with Mark, a local bounty hunter and more recently with Lawrence Reed.
Weapon-Handgun-Big Iron: Manufacturer: Old West Firearms & Replicas||Caliber: .700 Nitro Express||Production dates: December 2093 - Present (custom order only)||||Considered to be the most impractical handgun ever produced. The Big Iron has gained the reputation to shatter foreheads and break wrists.||||The manufacturer quickly stopped large scale production after terrible sales. But kept it as a custom order item.||||It's a popular choice with the reckless overconfident mercenaries who got the money.||||Leopold LORD Storch uses High Explosive rounds with his.
Weapon-Handgun-War and Peace: Manufacturer: Unknown||Caliber: .45 ACP||||The following information comes form intercepted radio transmissions.||||Curtis reported finding the 2 handguns after defeating a leader of the unknown group. Vivianne asked some questions to try and identify them.||||Based on these answers she could tell that these were some 1911 variant that were heavily customized. Both feature some gold-plated accents and custom grip plates.||||They have different finish, the one with the word war engraved on it used some kind of bluing and the other, with peace engraved used a nickel finish||||These are likely a reference to the book by Leo Tolstoy.
Weapon-Rifle-Type 47 Rifle: Manufacturer: Novak & Boyko|| ||This product of a long tradition in eastern europe, the 'Type 47 Rifle' is a modernized version of the AK-47. The main upgrade with this version comes from new materials and building processes. It doesn't use te same cartridge of the original since surplus is no longer existent and newer, better ammo exists.
Weapon-Sub Machine Gun-Type 41 SMG: Manufacturer: Novak & Boyko|| ||The concept of SMGs were thought to be obsolete for a long while. Designers at Novak & Boyko realized that like melee weapons, SMGs could find a niche for defense against pirates. Typically loaded with low penetration rounds, it's a somewhat common weapon for security details on larger spaceships. || ||Competitors outshine it nowadays. An unknown group is said to use them for space borne operations.
Weapon-Shotgun-Jeanne's Family Shotgun: Manufacturer: Original unknown, modified by Jeanne's father and Jeanne||Caliber: 10 Gauge shells|| ||This shotgun has been modified so much that it has almost nothing to do with the original model. It was given to Jeanne by her father when she officially joined THR-1. She's very protective about it and refuses to get another shotgun.
Weapon-Energy-Custom Mk18 Laser cutter: Manufacturer: Toolkit Manufacturing, modified by Jeanne|| ||This is a laser cutter used for work in space. But Jeanne modified some components to turn the 2- hour battery into a 2-second battery. The upside is that it turns the mediocre laser cutter designed to cut sheet metal into one that cuts people in half.
Weapon-Melee-Chain Axe: Manufacturer: Unknown|| ||It's an axe connected by a chain to a brass knuckle. Zander uses them like a meteor hammer.|| ||It doesn't look like an effective weapon. Zander has found ways to use it outside of combat.
Weapon-Melee-Vivianne's Leg: Manufacturer: Socrates, Medical Division||Production dates: May 2076 - Present|| ||One of the first cybernetic leg model to be considered on par with human legs. Many still uses this model even though it is about to reach 30th anniversary. For many, these prostetics became, enotianally, a part of themselves.|| ||Sand is a serious issue with the model as it can increase the wear of the main hinge rendering the leg unusable.|| ||The main shaft is strong enough to use it as an improvised weapon.
Weapon-Combo-GunBlade: Manufacturer: Unknown (likely a DIC TEC prototype)||Caliber: 10mm & 20 Gauge|| ||
Weapon-Combo-Lawrence's Cutlass & Flintl: Manufacturer: Unsure (read desc.)||Caliber: .58 Lead ball||||Both the cutlass and flintlock appear to have been made by hand and do not have any markings to identify the manufacturer.||||Vivianne claims she has serviced the flintlock a few times and thinks it could have been made by Old English Armoury but Old West Firearms is more likely.||||More importantly, WHO USES A FLINTLOCK IN 2106?
Weapon-Heavy-Saloum Mk-2: Manufacturer: ASUM||Caliber: 40mm micro missile|| ||A predecessor to the now flagship product of the Dakar based company ASUM. The Saloum Mk-2 is the first magazine based missile launchers for foot soldiers.|| || At the time of its creation the usage of anti-personnel missile was deemed unethical. Those concerns went the way of the dodo as the Solar War started.
Weapon-Heavy-GMG-04B: Manufacturer: FMB||Caliber: 40mm grenades||Production dates: June 2087 - January 2089||||The fruit if a cancelled army contract. FMB ended up having truck loads of the thing but no one to sell it too. Many attempts were made to sell them. Very few succeed.||||One of the more notable attempts was as t shirt canon for sporting events. One stadium got one right before the start of the Solar War.||||After the Solar War, many were sold to an unknown group.
Weapon-Heavy-Fortress Machine Gun: Manufacturer: FMB, modified by Jeanne||Caliber: .50 BMG||||This gun is a HMG-02C modified to be easier to use on THR-1's APC, Fortress.||||The 2 big changes is new mount system to better absorb the recoil and the quick barrel change system from the D model of the gun. Beside that, most of the internals remain unchanged.
Weapon-Gear-Epicurean Medic Rifle: Manufacturer: Socrates, Medical Division & Weapons Division||||One of the more unique offering of Socrates. This weapon concept came in existence when engineers from the Medical Division were wondering how to deliver a new healing agent. A Weapons Division engineer passed by and proposed to use a modified grenade launcher. In true Socrates fashion, it took a long march through bureaucracy of both divisions to get the project started, finished, marketed and sold.
Weapon-Gear-C4: Manufacturer: Toolkit Manufacturing|| ||C4 is a very popular plastic explosive. Developments in the field caused it to fall off during the 21st century. It got it stop back in the limelight thanks to asteroid mining operations.
